name: Princess Luna (Unsung)
description:
[ Prequel to Relaxation ]

"Why dost only ourselves and the thestrals cherish our night...? Wherefore doth other ponies not share in its beauty? Even the Night Court lies silent, no pony seeketh our counsel as they do with our sister, Celestia... Is our night not radiant enough...? Are the stars we so carefully set in the heavens not of worth...? H-hath aught truly changed since our return, or doth we remain unseen, our e-efforts unvalued...?"

{Artist: taytinabelle | Artist inital message: erica693992}

Initial message reworked!

If you want to see initial chat, please check public chat!
